languages.text:
Activating a bionic galvanization makes it work beyond its normal capabilities but at the detriment of the user.
Only one bionics can be set up for galvanization at a time.
Trauma of a body part that was augmented usually results in that augment malfunctioning -- losing it's positive effect and ability to galvanize it.

traits.locale_text:
Activating a bionic galvanization makes it work beyond its normal capabilities but at the detriment of the user.
Only one bionics can be set up for galvanization at a time.
Trauma of a body part that was augmented usually results in that augment malfunctioning -- losing it's positive effect and ability to galvanize it.

languages.text:
Some {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augments{/g} have galvanisation abilities. Using a galvanisation ability allows an augment to operate beyond its normal limits, but at the cost of severe strain on the user.
Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.
languages.original_text:
Activating a bionic galvanization makes it work beyond its normal capabilities but at the detriment of the user.
Only one bionics can be set up for galvanization at a time.
Trauma of a body part that was augmented usually results in that augment malfunctioning -- losing it's positive effect and ability to galvanize it.

traits.locale_text:
Some augments have galvanisation abilities. Using a galvanisation ability allows an augment to operate beyond its normal limits, but at the cost of severe strain on the user.
Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers trauma, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.

languages.text:
Некоторые {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}аугменты{/g} можно гальванизировать и таким образом активировать их особые способности. Это позволяет аугменту выйти за пределы обычных ограничений, но ценой серьёзной нагрузки на его обладателя.
Одновременно у персонажа может быть выбран только один аугмент, гальванизация которого доступна в бою.
Ести обладатель получает {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}травму{/g} аугментированной части тела, соответствующий аугмент выходит из строя: его больше нельзя гальванизировать и он не дает бонусов.

Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.

Некоторые {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}аугменты{/g} можно гальванизировать и таким образом активировать их особые способности. Это позволяет аугменту выйти за пределы обычных ограничений, но ценой серьёзной нагрузки на его обладателя.

languages.text:
Einige {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} haben darüber hinaus Galvanisierungsfähigkeiten.
Durch den Einsatz der Galvanisierung-Fähigkeit kann eine Augmentation ihre eigenen Grenzen überschreiten, was den Nutzer allerdings extrem belastet.
Es kann immer nur eine Augmentation galvanisiert werden.
Erleidet ein Körperteil mit einer installierten Augmentation ein Trauma, funktioniert die Augmentation nicht und verliert neben ihren positiven Effekten auch die Galvanisierung-Fähigkeit.
languages.original_text:
Some {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augments{/g} have galvanisation abilities. Using a galvanisation ability allows an augment to operate beyond its normal limits, but at the cost of severe strain on the user.
Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.

Einige {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} haben darüber hinaus Galvanisierungsfähigkeiten.

Es kann immer nur eine Augmentation galvanisiert werden.
Erleidet ein Körperteil mit einer installierten Augmentation ein Trauma, funktioniert die Augmentation nicht und verliert neben ihren positiven Effekten auch die Galvanisierung-Fähigkeit.

languages.text:
{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}Augmentations{/g} susceptibles d'être galvanisées. L'utilisation d'une capacité de galvanisation permet à une augmentation d'opérer au-delà de ses limites normales, cela au coût d'un stress important de l'organisme de l'utilisateur.
Une seule augmentation peut être galvanisée à la fois.
Une augmentation devient défaillante lorsque la partie du corps où elle est installée subit un traumatisme. Ses effets positifs et sa capacité de galvanisation sont alors neutralisés.
languages.original_text:
Some {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augments{/g} have galvanisation abilities. Using a galvanisation ability allows an augment to operate beyond its normal limits, but at the cost of severe strain on the user.
Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.

Une seule augmentation peut être galvanisée à la fois.
Une augmentation devient défaillante lorsque la partie du corps où elle est installée subit un traumatisme. Ses effets positifs et sa capacité de galvanisation sont alors neutralisés.

languages.text:
部分{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}植入物{/g}还具有电激能力。
使用电激能力可使植入物超常运作，但使用者将承受沉重的负荷。
一次只能配置一个植入物进行电激。
若装有植入物的身体部位遭受创伤，该植入物将失效，失去其正面效果和电激能力。
languages.original_text:
Some {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augments{/g} have galvanisation abilities. Using a galvanisation ability allows an augment to operate beyond its normal limits, but at the cost of severe strain on the user.
Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.

traits.locale_text:
部分{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}植入物{/g}还具有电激能力。
使用电激能力可使植入物超常运作，但使用者将承受沉重的负荷。
一次只能配置一个植入物进行电激。
若装有植入物的身体部位遭受创伤，该植入物将失效，失去其正面效果和电激能力。

languages.text:
Algunos {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}aumentos{/g} tienen capacidades de galvanización. Las capacidades de galvanización permiten a los aumentos operar más allá de sus límites habituales, pero esto acarrea consecuencias para el usuario.
No se puede preparar más de una galvanización al mismo tiempo.
Si una parte del cuerpo con un aumento instalado sufre una aflicción, el aumento se avería, por lo que pierde su efecto positivo y su capacidad de galvanización.
languages.original_text:

Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.

No se puede preparar más de una galvanización al mismo tiempo.
Si una parte del cuerpo con un aumento instalado sufre una aflicción, el aumento se avería, por lo que pierde su efecto positivo y su capacidad de galvanización.

languages.text:
Bazıları da bunlara ek olarak galvanizleme kabiliyetlerine sahiptirler.
Galvanizleme kabiliyeti kullanmak, {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}ogmentin{/g} normal sınırlarının ötesinde çalışmasını sağlasa da kullanıcı üzerinde ciddi bir yük oluşturur.
Aynı anda yalnızca bir ogment galvanizlemeye ayarlanabilir.
Ogment takılmış bir vücut parçası, bir travmaya maruz kaldığında o ogment de arızalanarak olumlu etkilerini ve galvanizleme kabiliyetini kaybeder.

traits.locale_text:
Bazıları da bunlara ek olarak galvanizleme kabiliyetlerine sahiptirler.
Galvanizleme kabiliyeti kullanmak, {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}ogmentin{/g} normal sınırlarının ötesinde çalışmasını sağlasa da kullanıcı üzerinde ciddi bir yük oluşturur.
Aynı anda yalnızca bir ogment galvanizlemeye ayarlanabilir.
Ogment takılmış bir vücut parçası, bir travmaya maruz kaldığında o ogment de arızalanarak olumlu etkilerini ve galvanizleme kabiliyetini kaybeder.

languages.text:
一部の{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}アグメント{/g}は、電解能力を持っている。電解能力を使うと、アグメントは通常を超えた性能を発揮できるが、その代償として、使用者に大きな負担がかかる。
一度に電解できるアグメントは1つだけ。
アグメントが装着された部位に{g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}トラウマ{/g}が加わると、そのアグメントは故障し、プラスの効果と電解能力を失う。

Only one augment can be set to galvanise at a time.
If a body part with an installed augment suffers {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}, that augment malfunctions, losing its positive effects and the galvanisation ability.
